pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.5.6 to 4.0.2 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.x requires Java 21; running Spring Boot 4 on Java 17 results in runtime errors or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings while using Java 21 features or libraries causes compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly release for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit release configuration, the compiler may default to an older bytecode version incompatible with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Validation API dependency required by Spring Boot 4 / Java 21 ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 relies on Jakarta EE namespaces; missing jakarta.validation-api causes compile errors for validation annotations.
